tool_args.label: MTA Safety Committee Key Safety/Security Metrics Feb 2024

payload.title: Key Safety Metrics / Key Security Metrics
payload.description: MTA Safety Committee presentation covering key safety and security performance metrics across MTA agencies including LIRR, Metro-North, NYCT, Bridges & Tunnels, Construction & Development, and MTA Police Department

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: NYCT F Line Derailment Investigation Jan 2024
tool_args.raw_text: NYCT continues its investigation into the January 10th, F Line Derailment. The Department of Subways (DOS), Service Delivery Management, is revising the "Other Than Front End Operation with Sectionalized Revenue Cars" procedures and is working with The Office of System Safety on preliminary recommendations until the final report is issued in the coming weeks.

payload.claim_text: NYCT continues its investigation into the January 10th, F Line Derailment. The Department of Subways is revising procedures and working with the Office of System Safety on preliminary recommendations.
payload.subject: New York City Transit

evidence_refs.source_quote: NYCT continues its investigation into the January 10th, F Line Derailment. The Department of Subways (DOS), Service Delivery Management, is revising the Other Than Front End Operation with Sectionalized Revenue Cars procedures and is working with The Office of System Safety on preliminary recommendations until the final report is issued in the coming weeks.

tool_args.label: NTSB Investigation of 96th Street Subway Collision
tool_args.raw_text: The National Transportation Safety Board investigation into the January 4th, 96th Street subway collision (NTSB) continues.

payload.claim_text: The National Transportation Safety Board investigation into the January 4th, 96th Street subway collision continues. NYCT supported the NTSB investigation.
payload.subject: New York City Transit

evidence_refs.source_quote: The National Transportation Safety Board investigation into the January 4th, 96th Street subway collision (NTSB) continues. NYCT supported the NTSB investigation with cooperation from multiple departments and fulfilled all requests for information.

tool_args.label: MNR GCT Fire Brigade Response Time 2023
tool_args.raw_text: The Grand Central Terminal Fire Brigade responded to 2,024 fire and EMS callouts in 2023, with an average response time of 2 minutes 24 seconds. This represents a 79% increase over 2022.

payload.claim_text: The Grand Central Terminal Fire Brigade responded to 2,024 fire and EMS callouts in 2023, with an average response time of 2 minutes 24 seconds. This represents a 79% increase over 2022, due in part to the opening of Grand Central Madison as well as increased post-Covid ridership levels.
payload.subject: Grand Central Terminal Fire Brigade

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Grand Central Terminal Fire Brigade, which monitors fire life safety systems and responds to fire and EMS alerts throughout the Grand Central Terminal complex 24/7, responded to 2,024 fire and EMS callouts in 2023, with an average response time of 2 minutes 24 seconds. This represents a 79% increase over 2022, due in part to the opening of Grand Central Madison as well as increased post-Covid ridership levels.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: MNR Conductor De-escalation Training 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Running a de-escalation training program for new and existing conductors. 100% of Conductors will receive this training by the end of 2023.

payload.claim_text: Running a de-escalation training program for new and existing conductors. 100% of Conductors will receive this training by the end of 2023. All new MNR employees are given in-person De-escalation techniques training as part of the Security Basics module at New Hire Orientation.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

evidence_refs.source_quote: Running a de-escalation training program for new and existing conductors. 100% of Conductors will receive this training by the end of 2023. All new MNR employees are given in-person De-escalation techniques training as part of the Security Basics module at New Hire Orientation.

tool_args.label: C&D Safety Management System Phase 1
tool_args.raw_text: C&D Safety has implemented the Safety Management System – Phase 1 of 3 phases

payload.claim_text: C&D Safety has implemented the Safety Management System - Phase 1 of 3 phases, implementing the new Safety Management System (SMS) throughout the entire agency by rolling out the program in stages. Phase 1 initially focuses on enhancements to current safety practices and procedures.
payload.subject: MTA Construction & Development

evidence_refs.source_quote: C&D Safety has implemented the Safety Management System - Phase 1 of 3 phases, implementing the new Safety Management System (SMS) throughout the entire agency by rolling out the program in stages to ensure all staff, supporting projects, vendors, and contractors are systematically adopting the new process and protocols.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

payload.subject: New York City Transit

evidence_refs.source_quote: Subway Customer Accident Rates decreased when comparing the most recent 12-month period to the previous one. It is worth noting that December 2023 Slip/Trip/Fall accidents were the lowest (187) when comparing to December 2022 (231).
